text_template: Hey girl it's Teffy. This week on Teffy Talks we talking Kendall and Jacob reality TV villain Spencer Pratt running for mayor and a look inside the Cannes Film Festival. Mind you I bought the majority of my crystals from Pratt Daddy Crystals. Incredible quality but I never thought he be running for mayor and it does pain me to say the words Pratt Daddy. If you not already following the show find us everywhere at Teffy Talks. Subscribe on all the podcast platforms so you can share with your other work bestie. See ya.
outro_variants: Subscribe on all the podcast platforms so you can share with your other work bestie.
